mission_rationale: Backfills source_repo metadata so fleet-wide audits attribute cfs-expo issues to canonical absolute path; tightens fleet-attribution accuracy that drives orchestrator triage and bead-routing decisions. Removes one of three remaining source_repo='.' cohorts blocking T2.3 of parent flywheel-8x2le.
